author: Bergasha
text: Add entity picker to automation editor call service action

author: Bergasha
text:
**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**  
It would be great to have entity\_id as a dropdown option in the Automation ui editor under Actions,

**Describe the solution you'd like**  
This dropdown could go between Call service and Service data

**Additional context**  
After creating an Automation in the ui I then have to navigate to developer tools- States just to find the name of the entity I want to use then go back to Automations and add it.

author: bramkragten
text: We should add the functions of `developer-tools/service` to the automation editor service call.

author: bramkragten
text: Add entity picker to service call action
